text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Did you end up enjoying that novel?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
It was so good! There was so much exciting magic
used by all these cool witches!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
The coolest witch out of everyone was Kashiwagi!
She reminded me of my grandma.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I know! She really is a wonderful witch! The
bubbling compassion behind her witty demeanor,
the way she watches over the protagonist from a
distance...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
And when the main character is in real trouble,
she gallantly appears and saves the day with her
powerful spells! She's depicted as completely
nonchalant—I love it!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Yeah, yeah! That's why I thought she's so cool!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I also can't say enough about Witch Agito! Not
matter how misunderstood she was, she had the
inner strength to stay true to herself!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
The fateful rival she encountered in the course of
walking her own path! The fierce battle that
ensued and her classic line—"Destiny is but a
chew toy for a witch!"

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Ah! I-I'm so sorry. I've been jabbering on this
whole time...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I love when you talk all you want about the books
you love! You can't just cut yourself off in the
middle of a flow like that! It's lame!
